name: mobodoro
description: Mobodoro is a mob programming Pomodoro timer built with TypeScript, Fastify, and WebSockets. It allows multiple clients to sync in real time, with unique session URLs and rotating mob order when a Pomodoro ends.

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc && npm run copy-static
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run create-deploy-package
scripts.package:tar: npm run build && npm run create-deploy-tar
scripts.create-deploy-package: cp deployment-package.json dist/package.json && cd dist && zip -r ../mobodoro-deploy.zip * && cd ..
scripts.create-deploy-tar: cp deployment-package.json dist/package.json && cd dist && tar -czf ../mobodoro-deploy.tar.gz * && cd ..
